seoTitle: Kents Lagoon vs Kentville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kents Lagoon and Kentville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kents Lagoon vs Kentville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kents Lagoon and Kentville.
heading: Kents Lagoon vs Kentville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kents Lagoon, Queensland and Kentville, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kentville has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kents Lagoon (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kents Lagoon or Kentville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kents Lagoon has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Kentville scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kents Lagoon scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Kentville scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kents Lagoon or Kentville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kentville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
